{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/47313?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/fabpot", "id": 47313, "login": "fabpot", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ3MzEz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48805", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-693", "name": "Protection Mechanism Failure"}], "description": "### Description

The 3.26.0 source-policy hardening changed the signature of `CoreExtension::checkArrow()` to take a boolean `$isSandboxed` instead of an `Environment`, and added the same `$isSandboxed` argument to `CoreExtension::arraySome()` and `CoreExtension::arrayEvery()`. Compiled templates were updated to pass the per-source sandbox state computed at the call site.

The deprecated internal wrappers exposed in `src/Resources/core.php` for legacy third-party code (`twig_check_arrow_in_sandbox()`, `twig_array_some()`, `twig_array_every()`) were not updated:

- `twig_array_some()` and `twig_array_every()` call `CoreExtension::arraySome()` / `arrayEvery()` without forwarding the sandbox state. The underlying methods default `$isSandboxed` to `false`, so the callable-must-be-a-`Closure` restriction is silently bypassed in sandbox mode and a string callable such as `'strcmp'` is accepted.
- `twig_check_arrow_in_sandbox()` passes the `Environment` object where `CoreExtension::checkArrow()` now expects a `bool`, which throws a `TypeError` on PHP 8+.

Compiled Twig templates are not affected: they call `CoreExtension::*` directly with the correct arguments. Applications are only impacted if they still call the deprecated `twig_*` helpers on top of a sandboxed `Environment`.

### Resolution

The three wrappers now resolve the current sandbox state via `twig_resolve_is_sandboxed()` (the same helper compiled templates use), and forward it to the corresponding `CoreExtension::*` method. `twig_check_arrow_in_sandbox()` no longer triggers a `TypeError`, and `twig_array_some()` / `twig_array_every()` now enforce the same sandbox restriction as compiled templates.

### Credits

We would like to thank El Kharoubi Iosif for reporting the issue and Fabien Potencier for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0027, "percentile": 0.18815}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T18:41:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48805"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-30T18:41:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/security/advisories/GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/twig/twig/CVE-2026-48805.yaml", "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/releases/tag/v3.27.0", "https://symfony.com/blog/cve-2026-48805-sandbox-state-regression-in-deprecated-internal-wrappers-in-src-resources-core-php", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/twigphp/Twig/security-advisories/GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig", "summary": "Twig: Sandbox state regression in deprecated internal wrappers in `src/Resources/core.php`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T18:41:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p42q-9prx-q5wq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.27.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "twig/twig"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.26.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Twig: Sandbox state regression in deprecated internal wrappers in `src/Resources/core.php`
